title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

title: Kundali Bhagya
desc: Pragya Arora's long-lost sisters, Preeta and Srishti, plot their own course in fate's uncharted waters where adversities and good times go hand in hand.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Reet hears Poonam's distressing screams from behind a closed door. Later, she discovers Poonam brutally beaten by her husband, left injured and helpless.

title: Vasudha
desc: Devansh informs Madhav that Chandrika has chosen Vasudha for him. Chandrika asks Vasudha for an explanation about her marriage choices.

title: Meet
desc: Whether it be employment or an unexpected marriage to her namesake, the tomboyish and fun-loving Meet challenges social conventions and gender roles every step of the way.

title: Meet
desc: Anubha exits the family residence after deceiving Meet to hide her deep sadness. Meanwhile, the young mother confuses Babita by insisting on traveling abroad to give birth to her child.

title: Zindagi Ki Mehek
desc: Mahek, a talented and aspiring chef, enters a cooking competition to follow her passion. Her life takes an unexpected turn when she crosses paths with Shaurya, the arrogant judge of the competition.

title: Guddan Tumse Na Ho Payega
desc: Guddan manages to carry the pots on her head despite various obstacles in her path. However, Durga chides her and to humiliate her further, writes 'Tumse Na Ho Payega' with henna on Guddan's hand.

title: Kumkum Bhagya
desc: Prarthana and Raunak meet by fate. She marries into a rich family but faces struggles. Prarthana works hard to save her marriage and secure her future, overcoming obstacles with determination.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: In the hospital, police ask Poonam about her injuries. After a while, she reveals Viren beat her and it was not an accident, shocking everyone.

title: Vasudha
desc: Vasudha admits to Madhav that she will not be able to marry him. So, Madhav tells Chandrika that he cannot marry a maid, to save Vasudha.
